shortDescription: 29+ casino brands with shared loyalty program spanning 15+ million members. 850-1,300+ games per brand, primarily Games Global (formerly Microgaming) with some Pragmatic Play, NetEnt, Evolution Live
payoutTimes: E-wallets: 1-3 business days. Cards: 2-5 business days. Bank transfers: 3-10 business days. 48-hour pending period standard across all brands. Some sources report same-day processing for verified accounts. Withdrawal delays frequently cited in player complaints (Trustpilot).
license: Kahnawake Gaming Commission (KGC) — operated by Apollo Entertainment Limited / Fresh Horizons Ltd. KGC license for international markets. UK Gambling Commission (UKGC) for UK-facing brands (e.g., Luxury Casino). Ontario AGCO/iGaming Ontario registration for Ontario-facing brands (e.g., Yukon Gold, Zodiac, Captain Cooks, Golden Tiger, Luxury). eCOGRA certified for fair play and RNG testing.
